brand_dna.category: Decorative bathroom safety hardware - grab bars disguised as bath accessories for aging-in-place and fall prevention.
brand_dna.core_belief: That bathing should be a safe, beautiful, and tranquil experience, and that safety, beauty, easy installation and affordability do not have to be mutually exclusive.
proof_points: LiveSafe Mounting System supports up to 500lbs in hollow wall substrates as well as in studs
Hollow wall anchors and stud mount flanges included FREE in every box (competitors charge $11-$50 extra)
ADA compliant grab bars, 1-1/4 inch diameter
Products designed from research with hundreds of end users in residential and senior living environments
brand_dna.positioning: Premium and design-led vs. institutional grab bars - luxurious yet affordable, where the safety device hides in plain sight as decor.

voice_pillars.name: Dignity-First
voice_pillars.desc: Frames safety around independence and self-respect, not frailty or medical decline.
voice_pillars.quote: prevent falls, preserve dignity, enhance home accessibility and promote independent living

voice_pillars.name: Safety Meets Style
voice_pillars.desc: Refuses the tradeoff between looking good and being safe; both are always promised together.
voice_pillars.quote: Why choose between safety and style when you can have both?

voice_pillars.name: Research-Backed
voice_pillars.desc: Grounds design choices in real study of where and why people fall in the bathroom.
voice_pillars.quote: We know the high risk fall zones in the bathroom, what causes people to fall

voice_pillars.name: Discreet by Design
voice_pillars.desc: Positions the product as hidden help - a bath accessory first, a grab bar second.
voice_pillars.quote: disguises grab bars as bath accessories, discretely providing the safety of grab bars

phrases: age in place with confidence and style
the perfect blend of functionality and elegance
safety and style when you can have both
secure support exactly when you're reaching for towels
transforms your bathroom's most vulnerable moment

icp: Adult children, caregivers, and aging homeowners who want to make a bathroom fall-safe without it looking like a hospital, and will pay more for grab bars that look like beautiful bath fixtures.

personas.name: The Caring Daughter
personas.description: An adult child outfitting a parent's home for safety who is moved by dignity, discretion, and decor that does not scream medical.

personas.name: Age-in-Place Homeowner
personas.description: A senior who wants to stay independent in their own home and responds to confidence, style, and easy installation.

personas.name: The Reseller/Installer
personas.description: A dealer or contractor who buys in quantity and is won by free included anchors, same-day response, and next-day shipping.

products_ladder.title: LiveWell Grabcessories Decorative Designer Swing Up Fold Down Grab Bar, 31.5"L x 1.25"D, LWSU-31.5x1.25 Series

offers: Free shipping on retail orders over $100
30-day return policy on eligible unused items in original packaging
LiveSafe Mounting System and anchors included free in every box
Reseller and affiliate programs with large-quantity pricing
Same-day customer service response; orders ship the following day

allowed.claim: ADA compliant grab bars with 1-1/4 inch diameter
Mounting system supports up to 500lbs in hollow walls that support the load and in studs
Hollow wall anchors and stud mount flanges included free in every box
Free shipping on retail orders over $100
Designed from research with hundreds of end users in residential and senior living environments

banned.claim: Prevents all falls or guarantees you will never fall
banned.why: Disease/injury-prevention absolute is unsubstantiated; safety products cannot promise elimination of risk.

banned.claim: Treats, cures, or reduces the effects of osteoporosis, arthritis, or any medical condition
banned.why: Disease-treatment claim is banned for this category; product is hardware, not a medical treatment.

banned.claim: Medically certified or hospital-grade safe for every wall type
banned.why: Unsupported certification claim; the 500lb rating is conditional on wall substrate, not universal.

banned.claim: Natural or non-toxic finish as a headline claim
banned.why: Vague 'natural/clean' terms are risky and unsubstantiated as headline claims per compliance rules.

banned.claim: Boosts mobility or restores independence for everyone
banned.why: Unqualified health/outcome claim that overstates results and cannot be backed for all users.
